title: S. O. 232 (E) dated 13.01.2020 appointment of member in NTCA

WU, 2556 (31), TR 21 TR, 2012 8. @I, 2460 (3), AT 9 Ry, 2015; o, TN 1173 (), G 16 A, 2016; 10, T3, 2367 (3), TG 6 JaTE, 2016; 11, DI, 5341 (31), TR 15 AR, 2018; 12, BIAT. 1516 (&), TG 3 I, 2019; 13, BIIM. 3172 (3), T 30 I, 2019. MINISTRY OF ENVIRONMENT, FOREST AND CLIMATE CHANGE - NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 13" January, 2020 S.0. 232(E).— In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-sections (1) and (2) of section 38L of the Wild Life (Protection) Act, 1972 (53 of 1972), the Central Government hereby appoints the following member to the National Tiger Conservation Authority for a period specified against his name with effect from the date of publication of this notification in the Official Gazette and for that purpose makes the following further amendments in the notification of the Government of India in the erstwhile Ministry of Environment and Forests, vide number S.0. 1403(E). dated the 4" September, 2006, namely:— Tn the said notification, for serial number 5 and the entries relating thereto, the following shall be substituted, namely:- 5. Shri Harshvardhan Singh - Member Dungarpur, Member of (He shall hold office up to 30" June, 2022 or till he ceases to bea Parliament (Rajya Sabha) Member of Rajya Sabha, whichever is earlier).”. [F. No. 15-25/2009-NTCA] Dr. ANUP KUMAR NAYAK, Addl. Dir. Gen. of Forests (Project Tiger) Note: The principal notification constituting the National Tiger Conservation Authority was published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, vide notification number S.0. 1403 (E), dated the 4" September, 2006 and subsequently amended as follows:- 1. S.0. 1889(E), dated the 2™ November, 2006: 2.
